case=one_step_synthetic_t5
command=one_step
depvar=y
covars=x1 x2
options=generated(x1) dist(t) df(5)
tol_coef=0.001
tol_vcov=0.01
n=2000
k=3
vmli_version=1.4.0
note=One-step MLE with dist=t df=5.0; true fpr=fnr=0.10, heteroskedastic residuals (b0=0.5, b1=0.8). Tolerance accounts for JAX-LBFGS vs Mata-BFGS optimizer differences.
